title: The Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Act, 1994
full_text: The Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Act, 1994 बाबासाहेबभीमरावअंबेडकरविश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम,1994 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199458 Act Number: 58 Enactment Date: 1994-09-30 Act Year: 1994 Short Title: The Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Act, 1994 Hindi Title: बाबासाहेबभीमरावअंबेडकरविश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम,1994 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and residential University in the State of Uttar Pradesh and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 10-01-1996 Notification: 10th January 1996, vide notification No. S.O. 18(E), dated 5th January, 1996, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
